allow: PowerShell($s = "DELETE FROM records WHERE demon = `$1 AND progress < `$2"; $hasher = [System.Security.Cryptography.SHA256]::Create\(\); $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($s\); $hash = $hasher.ComputeHash\($bytes\); [System.BitConverter]::ToString\($hash\).Replace\("-", ""\).ToLower\(\))

PowerShell(Get-Command cargo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name -First 5; Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe")
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5; Get-Command cargo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
